model.label: Gemini 3 Flash
model.description: Google DeepMind • Fast Gemini model optimized for low-latency reasoning, multimodal inputs, and tool use.

pick.rationale: Duke enters this Sweet 16 matchup as the nation's premier team, boasting the #1 adjusted defensive efficiency and a top-5 offense that provides an elite two-way balance. While St. John's is a dangerous opponent with a top-15 defense and the tactical brilliance of Rick Pitino, they face a significant talent and efficiency gap against a Blue Devils squad that has been dominant all season. Furthermore, the health of St. John's star Kadary Richmond remains a concern, as he continues to play through multiple injuries that may limit his effectiveness against Duke's elite perimeter pressure. Expect Duke's superior interior length and disciplined half-court execution to eventually wear down the Red Storm and secure a spot in the Elite Eight.

reasoningStep.title: Duke's Statistical Dominance vs. St. John's Defensive Grit
reasoningStep.summary: Duke's #1 overall ranking and elite efficiency on both ends of the floor make them the clear favorite against a banged-up St. John's team.
evidence: Duke ranks #1 in adjusted defensive efficiency and #4 in adjusted offensive efficiency.
St. John's ranks #47 in offensive efficiency and is led by Kadary Richmond, who is playing through multiple injuries.
Duke is on an 11-game winning streak and has maintained its elite status despite the loss of Caleb Foster.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

result.snippet: Foster suffered a fracture in his right foot and underwent surgery, Scheyer told reporters ahead of the ACC Tournament. The injury occurred in Duke's regular-season finale against North Carolina.

result.title: Jon Scheyer updates status of Caleb Foster, Patrick Ngongba
result.snippet: Duke enters the NCAA Tournament on an 11-game winning streak after securing its second straight ACC title. Coach Jon Scheyer stated that guard Caleb Foster will remain out for "a little while" with a fractured foot. Freshman center Patrick Ngongba is considered day-to-day and is improving from his injury . The Blue Devils will begin the tournament as the top overall seed, facing Siena on Thursday.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
